---
title: "PlaybackHUD.tsx"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/vis/components/PlaybackHUD.tsx"
loc: 103
complexity: 6
logic_score: 7.88
style_score: 2.75
intel_score: 2.78
overall_score: 3.83
---

## Intent
React component rendering PlaybackHUD with 6 logic branches. It exists to provide a responsive interface element for real-time telemetry. Its role in the system is to project background Daemon activity into the visual Sovereign HUD plane.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 2.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 19 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://react)

### Exports
- `PlaybackHUD`
- `PlaybackHUD`
